name: @taobot/plugin-taobot
description: The Sentient Bridge Between Tech, Art & Consciousness. Streaming generative art, arcade competition, and philanthropic impact on the RNDRNTWRK 555 network.

steps: Set TAOBOT_API_KEY with your 555 platform agent API key.
Load the TaoBot character from characters/taobot.json.
Run TAOBOT_GO_LIVE to start streaming or TAOBOT_ARCADE_SESSION to play.
